description:
Offered: every semester
Teacher candidates complete the practicum five days weekly in a special education setting under the direction of a mentor who is certified in the area of licensure sought by the candidate and under the guidance of the university supervisor. Candidates assume the role of the teacher of students with severe disabilities.
Prerequisite(s): Successful Passage of Stage Two Education Unit Review
Corequisite(s): EDUC 4550
prerequisites: Successful Passage of Stage Two Education Unit Review
